series_metadata.series_description: Documentation of amounts due and payments received (including but not limited to fees, cost recovery, Findings and Orders and settlements) that is created or received by a Division or program of the Ohio EPA and is not retained by the Office of Fiscal Administration.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain documents related to federal funds in accordance with the cooperative agreement or grant agreement. Retain state documents in program area for 1 year after amount is paid in full, then transfer to storage for 2 years, then destroy., Paper: Recycle
